declaredLane: Feature inner-layer dependency lint and recurrence prevention
observedMutationClass: static lint script under tools/workflow that scans Features/<Feature>/(Domain|Application|Presentation|Infrastructure)/**/*.cs using-declarations against an inward-only matrix; package.json policy chain wiring; presentation guardrail doc updated with lint entrypoint and folder-convention exemptions
acceptanceEvidenceClass: feature layer dependency check, full rules lint chain, and a manual fail-message sanity check via a temporary violation that was reverted
rootCause: JG repo has no asmdef boundaries, so Clean Architecture single-direction (Presentation -> Application -> Domain; Infrastructure -> {Application, Domain}) was only described in docs and not enforced in CI. Composition roots and diagnostic drivers blurred the boundary, making accidental inward-only violations plausible during refactors.
prevention: Add tools/workflow/test-feature-layer-dependencies.mjs that hard-fails on inner-feature using-declarations that violate the inward-only matrix. Auto-exempt feature-root files (Assets/Scripts/Features/<Feature>/<file>.cs) for composition roots and Presentation/Diagnostics/** for editor-only drivers. Wire feature:layer:lint into npm policy:lint and rules:lint chain so the gate runs in pre-commit and CI. Do not introduce per-file allowlists; new diagnostic owners must live under Presentation/Diagnostics/ or be promoted to a composition-root file. This change preserves the existing hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, and progress evidence overload.
verification: node tools/workflow/test-feature-layer-dependencies.mjs; npm run --silent rules:lint; manual fail-message sanity check via a temporary using Features.Garage.Presentation in Assets/Scripts/Features/Garage/Application/InitializeGarageUseCase.cs (reverted)
